title: cystopteris filix-femina
intro: Cystopteris filix-femina, also known as the brittle fern or lady fern, is a species of fern native to Europe and North America, characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds. Traditionally, Cystopteris filix-femina has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. Cystopteris filix-femina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
